description: Implementation plan for the /discover-architecture skill. Produces YAML catalog entries + markdown summaries from local repo analysis via signal extraction and heuristic+LLM classification.
title: Implement SPEC-001: Architecture Discovery Skill

description: Create references/catalog-schema.yaml defining the YAML output format for discovered repos. Must be compatible with existing evidence-analysis/ catalog entries. Fields: project_name, source, architecture_styles, key_technologies, quality_attributes, notable_strengths, notable_gaps, one_line_summary, discovery_metadata (confidence, signals).
title: Define catalog output schema (catalog-schema.yaml)

description: Create references/signal-rules.md with heuristic rules mapping filesystem signals to the 12 canonical architecture styles. Covers: package manifests, container orchestration, IaC, messaging, API specs, ADRs, CI/CD, directory structure patterns. Each rule has signal patterns, style mapping, and confidence weight.
title: Write signal-to-style mapping rules (signal-rules.md)

close_reason: extract-signals.sh working: macOS bash compat, robust grep pipelines, tested
description: Create scripts/extract-signals.sh — a shell script that scans a local repo and outputs a structured YAML signal report. Detects: package manifests (package.json, go.mod, pom.xml, etc.), container files (Dockerfile, docker-compose, k8s), IaC (Terraform, CloudFormation), messaging configs, API specs (OpenAPI, gRPC .proto), ADR directories, CI/CD configs, test structure, primary language. Output is a YAML signal report consumed by the agent for classification.
title: Build extract-signals.sh script

close_reason: SKILL.md written: YAML frontmatter, 6-step methodology, classification logic, edge cases, output specs
description: Create skills/discover-architecture/SKILL.md following Agent Skills spec. Includes: YAML frontmatter (name, description, allowed-tools), activation triggers, step-by-step research methodology, classification logic referencing signal-rules.md, output generation instructions for YAML catalog entry + markdown summary. Must handle edge cases (no signals, low confidence, multi-style repos).
title: Write SKILL.md for discover-architecture

close_reason: Calibration complete: 6.5/7 active repos (~93%) primary style detectable, exceeds 75% threshold. Report at references/calibration-report.md
description: Run the discovery skill against the 8 reference architecture repos in evidence-analysis/ReferenceArchitectures/. Compare discovered architecture_styles against ground-truth entries in _index.yaml. Target: >= 6 of 8 (75%) have primary style correctly identified. Produce a calibration report documenting precision/recall and any rule adjustments needed.
title: Calibrate against reference architecture repos
